title: juncus × correctus
intro: Juncus × correctus, also known as Soft Rush or Corrected Soft Rush, is a hybrid plant species within the Juncaceae family, resulting from the cross-breeding of Juncus bufonius and Juncus articulatus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Juncus × correctus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be applied topically to the affected area or ingested under medical supervision.
